description_long: This is a female adult pedestrian with a medium build, standing upright and facing forward. She is dressed in a unique, off-shoulder dress with voluminous, tiered sleeves that extend down to her calves, each sleeve ending in tassels. The dress features a fitted bodice with a corset-like midsection and a high-cut skirt, revealing her legs. She wears open-toed sandals and has her hair styled in long, thick braids that are gathered into a high bun with some braids hanging down. Her skin tone is dark, and her facial expression is neutral. The overall appearance is stylish and somewhat fantastical, suitable for an urban or fantasy-themed environment.
description: A standing female adult in a distinctive off-shoulder dress with tiered, tassel-ended sleeves, open-toed sandals, and braided hair in a high bun.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed bodice, off-shoulder neckline, and the full length of the tiered sleeves with tassels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the dress, the volume of the sleeves, and the high bun hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dress, the way the sleeves drape, and the arrangement of the braids and bun.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile of the dress, sleeves, and footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: off-shoulder dress with tiered, voluminous sleeves and a fitted bodice, featuring tassel accents and open-toed sandals
attribute_hairstyle: long braids styled in a high bun with some braids hanging down
